headline: Rapid Valley Annihilation: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Rapid Valley Annihilation is projected #13 of 16 with a 545.30 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Colston Loveland, Quinshon Judkins, and Caleb Williams. The immediate priority is improving the FLEX slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.) while sending 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the FLEX slot above Blake Corum's 54.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 63.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 9.60-point projected gap to Phalhala or Bust.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (SmokyValleyWheatWarriors), 2027 Round 2 (Northside Kings) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (SmokyValleyWheatWarriors), 2027 Round 2 (Northside Kings) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the current WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #13 of 16 at 545.30 lineup C-AVI. Phalhala or Bust is immediately above at 554.90, a gap of 9.60. Crimson Tide Pods is immediately behind at 523.60.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Colston Loveland (98.0), Quinshon Judkins (75.8), and Caleb Williams (71.4).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.) while sending 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the FLEX slot above Blake Corum's 54.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 63.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 9.60-point projected gap to Phalhala or Bust. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Blake Corum is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 54.2. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
